title: Validate UI and copy of the 'Loss Aversion' and 'Trial Corner' Hub
description: Ensures all UI components, messaging, and copy on the Trial Corner hub and its pop-ups match the PRD specifications.
preconditions: User has an active trial with 6 days remaining.
User is on the Trial Corner hub page.

steps.description: 1. On the hub, verify the status text 'Your ₹1 trial is active.' is present.
2. Verify the promise text 'Easy cancellation anytime. No hidden loops.' is present.
3. Verify the 'Remind me' toggle has the correct label and micro-copy.
4. Click 'Cancel'. On the pop-up, verify the headline is 'Wait! Don't lose your free days.'
5. Verify the body text explicitly mentions losing '6 days' of access.
6. Verify the primary button is 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' and the secondary button is 'Cancel/Pause Anyway & Lose Access' with lower visual prominence.

expected_result: All text, copy, and UI elements on the specified screens match the design direction and messaging strategy outlined in the PRD.
